title: My Work calendar view to reflect Company hours
excerpt:

posts.author: mattbr (Matt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unless I am missing something, the ‘My Work’ tab, showing as ‘Calendar’ starts the day at 1200am. Now, some companies may indeed start their day then, but I would hazard a guess that not too many?

Please can you make it so that this view matches what we have set as the company office hours.
Will proposed update on the roadmap that allows for items to have longer than an hour duration be included in this view?

At this time we’re not looking for an alternative in the App Store as we want to use the My Work section to manage tasks.

Cheers,
M.
